title: Uses of cost information
summary: 9609 AS — pricing, profit measurement, and cost control uses.
learningObjectives: Explain uses of cost data in decisions.

simpleExplanation.title: Costs drive decisions
simpleExplanation.summary: Accurate costs support pricing, show product profitability, and highlight where to cut waste.
steps: Set minimum price above unit cost.

sections.content: **Uses of cost information** (5.4.3) connects **operations** and **marketing** pricing. Apply to **case product lines**.
